calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Nov-10-2003 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-10-2003 Vacated
MINI MINUTES: This cause came as a re-assignment by the Dept. of the PJ.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk S. Ravinantapricha. V. Mack, and CSR: Leticia Perez.
Arnold Evje, II; Esq. for Plaintiff Andre Ferigno; also present.
Defendant, Charles Davis presents in pro per.
Parties reached a settlement by stipulation. Terms of the written settlement were read into the record as follows: Stipulation for entry of Judgment.
Plaintiff is entitled to a judgment against the defendant for restitution and possession of the premises of the property located at: 1215 Laguna St., #105, San Francisco, CA.
Forfeiture of the rental agreement, back rent in the amount of $268.47 and daily damages of 29.83 from Oct. 1, 2003 through Nov. 20, 2003. Issuance of an immediate WRIT of possession for the premises with NO STAY for any reason. If Defendant vacate on or before 5 p.m. on Nov. 20, 2003, Plaintiff waives back rent and damages.
If Defendant fail to do so, Plaintiff will be awarded and amended judgment for all back rent and damages, attorney's fees of $900.00 and costs of $292.00 for the total of $2,981.80.
Defendant waives any right to make a motion to set aside, vacate any judgment, stay of execution or relief from forfeiture.
Each party waives any claim against the other and generally releases the other from all claims. If defendant is evicted, any personal property left at the premises is deemed abandoned and may be disposed of by the Plaintiff.
Defendant represents that there is no one else occupying the premises who claims a right to possession. Security deposit is declared forfeited.
Each side will bear its own costs and attorney fees.
All parties agreed to the settlement in open court.
The Court deemed the matter settled and trial date is vacated.
